prompt_rules.description_brief: Write in an ultra-minimal, punchy tone for WovenLoomRugs. The opening should deliver the key hook in one confident line. Story paragraphs should be short and sharp — no fluff. The rug 'makes every other choice in the room feel right.' Lead with atmosphere, not specifications.
